instruction: Exit the bathroom, wait at the white rug in the hallway.

text: I'll start by observing my surroundings.

I'm in a bathroom with a vanity and mirror on the right, and I can see an open doorway to the left leading out. I need to head toward that exit, so I'm turning left and moving forward through the opening.
I'm in a bathroom. There's an exit doorway on the left side leading to a hallway/other room. Let me head toward it.
I can see the doorway ahead opening into a hallway or bedroom, so I'm moving forward toward it.
The exit doorway is ahead. Let me move forward through it.
I can see through the doorway into a hallway with a light-colored rug visible on the floor ahead. Let me move forward through the doorway.
I can see the doorway leading out to the hallway, and there appears to be a light rug on the floor beyond. Let me continue forward through the doorway.
I can see the white rug through the doorway on the dark wooden floor ahead, so I need to move out of the bathroom and head toward it.
I can now clearly see a white rug on the dark floor beyond the doorway. Let me move forward toward it.
I've stepped out of the bathroom into the hallway and spotted a white rug ahead and to the right. I'm adjusting my direction slightly to move toward it and position myself on or near the rug.
I've exited the bathroom into the hallway. The white rug is right ahead, slightly to the right. Let me move toward it.
I've left the bathroom and I'm now at the white rug in the hallway, moving forward to position myself directly on it.
The white rug is right in front of me now. I've exited the bathroom and am at the hallway white rug. Let me move forward a bit to be right at the rug.
I've reached the white rug in the hallway—that's where I need to stop.
I've exited the bathroom and reached the white rug in the hallway — it's right at my feet. This matches the instruction's endpoint. I'll stop here.

I successfully completed the navigation task. I exited the bathroom, moved through the doorway into the hallway, and stopped right at the white rug — exactly as the instruction specified: "Exit the bathroom, wait at the white rug in the hallway." The episode ended with the STOP action while positioned directly on/at the white rug.
